texto: My mother's deathchanged the alchemy of food.Holidays run together nowlike ungrooved rivers. I forgetwhat they are for. I buy bakery goods.They look deadunder the blue lights.I don't do anything the way she taught mebut I get fat.I don't look like her and I don't soundlike her, but I stand like her.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Florence Weinberger: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “My mother's deathchanged the alchemy of food.Holidays run together nowlike ungrooved rivers. I fo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, death, mothers pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e mudanca.
